novel_features.name: Prosecution Timeline
novel_features.description: See every prosecution event in chronological order — office actions, amendments, continuity filings, and PTAB proceedings merged into one stream

novel_features.name: Family Tree Traversal
novel_features.description: Walk the full patent family tree — continuations, divisionals, and CIPs — rendered as an indented tree or flat table

novel_features.name: Portfolio Snapshot
novel_features.description: Get aggregate stats for any assignee's patent portfolio — filing counts, grant rates, art-unit distribution, and status breakdown

novel_features.name: Portfolio Diff
novel_features.description: See what changed in an assignee's patent portfolio since your last check — new filings, status changes, and ownership transfers

novel_features.name: Batch Prosecution Pull
novel_features.description: Fetch prosecution history for a list of patents in one command — transactions, continuity, and assignments with automatic rate-limit throttling

novel_features.name: Related-Art Cross-Reference
novel_features.description: Find patents in your local cache that share the same art unit, assignee, or inventor as a given patent

novel_features.name: Prosecution One-Look
novel_features.description: Get the full current state of any patent in one command — status, owner, family depth, PTA days, PTAB exposure, and attorney of record
